tags.name: `mc-picker`
tags.description:
Purpose: To allow users to select a value from a list by scrolling through options.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need a compact way to select an item from a list.
When not to use: When you have a small number of items to choose from.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-picker-item
Alternative component names: Picker, Scrollable Selector, Wheel Selector, Scroll Picker

Events:

  * `pickerselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted upon an item scrolls to the middle.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the picker items go.

Attributes:

  * `preventinitialeventdispatch` {`boolean`} - True if the pickerselected event shouldn't be
dispatched on initial load when used in a popover.

  * `itemwidth` {`PickerItemWidth | undefined`} - The width of picker items. Set to 'fixed' for fixed-width items.

Properties:

  * `debouncedSetValue` - 

  * `dispatchedItem` {`IMcListItem | undefined`} - 

  * `intersectionObserver` - 

  * `itemHeight` {`number`} - 

  * `selectedItem` {`IMcListItem | undefined`} - 

  * `selectionWindow` {`HTMLDivElement | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`HTMLDivElement | undefined`} - 

  * `onIntersection` - 

  * `noborder` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disablehandlemousemove` {`boolean`} - 

  * `type` {`string`} - 

  * `disablecircularkeynav` {`boolean`} - 

  * `scrolltofocused` {`boolean`} - 

  * `focused` {`boolean`} - Gets whether the picker is focused.

  * `preventinitialeventdispatch` {`boolean`} - True if the pickerselected event shouldn't be
dispatched on initial load when used in a popover.

  * `itemwidth` {`PickerItemWidth | undefined`} - The width of picker items. Set to 'fixed' for fixed-width items.

  * `pickerselected` - Emitted when an item is selected

attributes.name: preventinitialeventdispatch
attributes.description:
`preventinitialeventdispatch` {`boolean`} - True if the pickerselected event shouldn't be
dispatched on initial load when used in a popover.

Property: preventinitialeventdispatch

Default: false

attributes.name: itemwidth
attributes.description:
`itemwidth` {`PickerItemWidth | undefined`} - The width of picker items. Set to 'fixed' for fixed-width items.

Property: itemwidth

attributes.name: onpickerselected
attributes.description: `pickerselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted upon an item scrolls to the middle.
